predictions.description: while loop re-reads {var:keepGoing} each iteration; a child set-variable to 'false' at loopCount 3 ends the loop after exactly 3 iterations (maxIterations=20 backstop untouched)
the while-condition variable holds the flipped value after the loop

exit-loop fired inside a nested If stops the CURRENT iteration immediately (the sibling step after the If is skipped on iteration 3) and terminates the loop: crumbs show after-if for iterations 1-2 only
continue-loop fired inside a nested If skips remaining siblings for that iteration only: crumb for loopCount 3 missing, 4 and 5 present
exit-loop/continue-loop signals are scoped to their loop frame — top-level execution continues normally afterward
